understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to progress through all levels by positioning every selectable piece (P or S) onto a corresponding goal tile (+) simultaneously within the step budget, achieving WIN for the entire run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (identified by player.position) by 3 pixels in the direction unless blocked by walls (#), boundaries, or other objects; pushable blocks (B) may shift if adjacent. CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece at the exact target_position pixel coordinates. Multiple selectables require individual control via CLICK to maneuver all to goals at once; heuristics like movement.blocked provide hints but actions must be tested.
